---
name: Discussion
about: Design conversation, posture question, or substrate direction
title: "[Discussion] "
labels: discussion
---

## What's on your mind

A clear framing of the question, the tension, or the proposal.

## Why now

What prompted this? A piece of work you're about to start, a friction you noticed, an idea sparked by another contributor's PR?

## What you've considered

If you've already thought through alternatives, share them. Saves a turn.

## What you're hoping for

Is this a "let's talk" question, a "I want to do X, are there objections?" question, or a "I think NORTH-STAR §X needs to change" proposal? Naming the shape helps reviewers engage.
